title: Vacancy for Financial Analyst at IndusInd Bank

jsonLd.title: Vacancy for Financial Analyst at IndusInd Bank
jsonLd.description:
Grow your career with IndusInd Bank! We are hiring a Financial Analyst for our Chandigarh team. Be part of a workplace that celebrates innovation, diversity, and performance.

About IndusInd Bank:
IndusInd Bank is a leading organization in the Remote sector, committed to excellence, innovation, and employee growth. We offer a dynamic work environment where talent is recognized and rewarded.

Key Responsibilities:
• Coordinate with external auditors during annual audits
• Manage credit risk assessment and loan appraisal processes
• Monitor market trends and provide investment recommendations
• Prepare and analyze financial statements, reports, and budgets
• Maintain general ledger and ensure accurate bookkeeping
• Liaise with banks, regulators, and financial institutions
• Manage accounts payable and accounts receivable functions

Required Skills & Qualifications:
• B.Arch / M.Arch from recognized institution
• 6-10 years of relevant experience
• Proficiency in QuickBooks
• Proficiency in Tally
• Proficiency in Credit Analysis
• Proficiency in Forecasting
• Proficiency in Bloomberg Terminal
• Proficiency in SQL
• Proficiency in GST
• Proficiency in IFRS

Work Mode: Remote - Work from anywhere in India

What We Offer:
• Modern office with recreational facilities
• Annual paid leaves and casual leaves
• Learning & development budget
• Provident Fund and Gratuity as per company policy
• Flexible working hours
• Comprehensive health insurance for self and family
• Salary Range: 12 LPA - 25 LPA per annum

Location: Chandigarh, Punjab, India

If you are excited about this opportunity, apply now and take the next step in your career journey with IndusInd Bank!
